---
title: Feature scaling
---

`q.transform.scale` provides sklearn-compatible numeric scaling transformers.
Use them inside `q.transform.Pipeline` so learned parameters are fitted only on
fit partitions:

```python
pipeline = q.transform.Pipeline(
	[("scale", q.transform.scale.StandardScaler())]
)
scaled = pipeline.fit_transform(dataset)
```

`StandardScaler` is provided by scikit-learn and exposed through the QRT
namespace for a consistent public API.
